comments.body: Karan i know this setting but the question is that i want to remove sim from emulator like emulator has slot like real device but no sim in it
There is voice status and data status in which you can change that to "Unregistered"

@KaranMehta I'm trying to answer powerusers.codidact.com/posts/294629, so need it removed or disabled. The emulator doesn't permit either via the AOSP GUI, and that doesn't remove or disable the SIM. Does it require a reboot?
@AliJawadHussainGorayya Perhaps, rephrase the question with a spell-checker enabled.
I've submitted a modification to assist. I hope that it does.

answers.body:
You should go to menu options as shown in below image,

And then,

Change whichever setting you want from Cellular menu

Although I've yet to ascertain how to eject a present SIM, it can be disabled:

  1. Install an emulator that permits it:

    Properties

hw.camera.front                            emulated

hw.displayRegion.0.1.width                 1080

hw.displayRegion.0.1.yOffset               0

  2. Select "More" (the horizontal pill):

  4. Set voice and data to "Unregistered":

    ...and taping the relevant node doesn't disable it.

  5. reboot. If you don't, all you'll see is:

title: Does any Android emulator provide an unfilled SIM slot?
body: I want to remove insert SIM in Android Emulator, but I cannot see any setting there. How I can achieve it, or is there any specific model, here, in which we can insert and remove a SIM card?
